description: dgKey: serialized KEL events
notes: Present in current TS raw-LMDB slice; requires Suber/Komer parity
gate_rationale: Core event persistence for init and incept state and list and aid visibility and compatibility reopen.

description: Habitat records (controller databases)
notes: Present in current TS raw-LMDB slice; requires Suber/Komer parity
gate_rationale: Habitat records back list and aid and are required when unlocking existing stores.

description: Habitat name database; maps (domain, name) -> Prefixer
notes: Present in current TS raw-LMDB slice; requires Suber/Komer parity
gate_rationale: Alias to prefix mapping required by list and aid and cross-store compatibility mode.

description: Reply '/rpy' messages. Uses .sdts, ssgs, and .scgs for datetimes and sigs
gate_rationale: Reply messages carry endpoint and location authorizations used by ends add and OOBI bootstrap.

description: Reply '/rpy' escrow indices of partially signed reply messages; Maps route->SAID
gate_rationale: Reply escrow indices are needed to complete partially signed endpoint and OOBI related replies.

description: AuthN/AuthZ by local controller cid of endpoint provider at eid for 'role'
gate_rationale: Endpoint auth records are required to persist controller role authorization for ends add.

description: AuthN/AuthZ by endpoint provider at eid of location at scheme in URL
gate_rationale: Location auth linkage is required for endpoint location resolution during OOBI bootstrap.

description: Service endpoint identifier (eid) auths keyed by controller; extracted from rpy msg
gate_rationale: Primary endpoint authorization table for ends add and mailbox endpoint publication.

description: Service endpoint locations keyed by eid.scheme
gate_rationale: Endpoint location table needed to store and resolve service URLs for peers and mailboxes.

description: Exchange 'exn' messages
gate_rationale: Exchange message body store underpins controller communications and challenge message transport.

description: Exchange message indexed signatures
gate_rationale: Indexed signatures for exchange messages are required for interoperable communications verification.

description: Exchange message non-indexed signatures
gate_rationale: Non-indexed exchange signatures are required for full message verification compatibility.

description: Accepted, signed 12-word challenge response 'exn' messages keyed by signer prefix
gate_rationale: Challenge acceptance tracking is required for challenge generate respond verify interop.

description: Successful, signed 12-word challenge response 'exn' messages keyed by signer prefix
gate_rationale: Challenge response success tracking is required for verification state and replay safety.

description: Config-loaded OOBIs to be processed asynchronously; keyed by OOBI URL
gate_rationale: Inbound OOBI processing queue required for OOBI resolve and initial trust bootstrap.

description: Escrow OOBIs that failed to load, retriable; keyed by OOBI URL
gate_rationale: Failed OOBI escrow and retry state required for robust OOBI resolution workflows.

description: OOBIs with outstanding client requests
gate_rationale: Outstanding OOBI client request tracking required to manage in-flight resolution attempts.

description: Resolved OOBIs successfully processed
gate_rationale: Resolved OOBI state required to confirm completed bootstrap and prevent duplicate processing.

description: Well-known OOBIs to be used for MFA against a resolved OOBI
gate_rationale: Well-known OOBI state required for endpoint trust and multifactor bootstrap paths.

description: Multi-OOBI where association is made between one AID and multiple OOBIs
gate_rationale: Multi-OOBI associations required when one AID is discovered across multiple OOBI endpoints.

description: Multifactor well-known OOBI authentication records to process; keyed by ctrlr URL
gate_rationale: Pending multifactor OOBI auth records required for advanced endpoint resolution checks.

description: Resolved multifactor well-known OOBI auth records; keyed by ctrlr URL
gate_rationale: Resolved multifactor OOBI auth records required to finalize trusted endpoint state.

description: Global settings for Habery environment
notes: Present in current TS raw-LMDB slice; requires Suber/Komer parity
gate_rationale: Habery global settings required for startup behavior and reopening local or KLI compatible stores.

description: Global parameters for all prefixes. param label -> param
notes: Present in current TS raw-LMDB slice; requires Suber/Komer parity
gate_rationale: Global keystore params include AEID and salt policy required for init and unlock and encryption semantics.

description: pubkey -> privkey
notes: Present in current TS raw-LMDB slice; requires Suber/Komer parity
gate_rationale: Private key storage and decryption are mandatory for unlocking and signing from encrypted stores.

description: Not yet used by KERIpy, added by Phil for GroupSignifyHab
notes: Present in current TS raw-LMDB slice; requires Suber/Komer parity
gate_rationale: Encrypted private extras are part of encrypted keeper semantics and must remain decryptable.

description: Not yet used by KERIpy, added by Phil for GroupSignifyHab
notes: Present in current TS raw-LMDB slice; requires Suber/Komer parity
gate_rationale: Encrypted next key material semantics must match for secure at-rest behavior.

description: Index of keys to pre; 1stpubkey -> prefix/1stpubkey(temp)
notes: Present in current TS raw-LMDB slice; requires Suber/Komer parity
gate_rationale: Prefix index records are required for incept outputs and identifier visibility after reopen.

description: Key parameters; pre -> PrePrm
notes: Present in current TS raw-LMDB slice; requires Suber/Komer parity
gate_rationale: Per-prefix key parameters include cryptographic settings and salt behavior required for parity.

description: Key situations; pre -> PreSit
notes: Present in current TS raw-LMDB slice; requires Suber/Komer parity
gate_rationale: Key situation state is required to reopen keystores and derive stable identifier status.

description: Index of pubkeys by pre & ridx for replay in est evt order
notes: Present in current TS raw-LMDB slice; requires Suber/Komer parity
gate_rationale: Public key index ordering is required for deterministic replay and incept compatibility.

description: An index by topic of EXN message digests
gate_rationale: Mailbox topic index is required for ordered retrieval and communication synchronization.

description: EXN messages (CESR streams) of messages to send
gate_rationale: Mailbox message body storage is required for send and receive interop via mailbox mode.
